proposal1.heroHeadline: Driven Digital is losing $75,000 annually writing proposals manually. Here's what's happening.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, creating a proposal takes hours. With our system, it's ready in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the losses Driven Digital faces every day.

problems.title: Wasted Hours
problems.description: Each proposal takes 3 hours to craft. That's 3 hours not spent driving results for manufacturers.

problems.title: Revenue Drain
problems.description: Every delayed proposal means potential clients drift away. Estimated $15,000 in missed opportunities annually.

problems.title: Employee Burnout
problems.description: Your team spends 20% of their time on proposals. That's time that could enhance digital marketing strategies.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals risk inconsistency. This weakens your brand image in the highly competitive market.

problems.title: High Error Rate
problems.description: Manual processes lead to errors. Each mistake could cost a deal, potentially $10,000 in lost contracts.

problems.title: Slow Response Time
problems.description: A slow proposal process means clients wait longer. This idle time risks losing them to faster competitors.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Here's how our AI system transforms your proposal process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Right now, proposals take hours to draft. With our AI, they're ready in 47 seconds, customized and consistent.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: Current manual methods risk branding errors. Our system ensures every proposal aligns with your brand perfectly.

solutions.title: Increased Productivity
solutions.description: Your team spends hours on proposals. Our system frees up time for them to focus on what they do best: marketing.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual errors are costly. Our AI reduces mistakes, ensuring you maintain professional credibility.

solutions.title: Faster Client Acquisition
solutions.description: Slow proposals lose clients. Our rapid generation keeps prospects engaged and more likely to close.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Driven Digital's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Driven Digital around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Driven Digital.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Empower Acme Corp's Growth with Driven Digital's Expertise
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our tailored digital marketing strategies will convert visitors into loyal customers, increasing revenue and brand presence.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to digital inefficiencies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves without converting is revenue walking out the door. Acme Corp is losing potential sales daily.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: Over 50% of users access sites via mobile. Acme Corp's current site loses these visitors, impacting potential revenue.

problems.title: Weak SEO Performance
problems.description: Acme Corp's low search engine ranking results in lost visibility and customer acquisition opportunities.

problems.title: Ineffective Content Strategy
problems.description: Without engaging content, Acme Corp fails to capture interest and drive business, leading to missed sales.

problems.title: Outdated Website Design
problems.description: A dated site reduces visitor trust, costing Acme Corp potential clients and sales conversions.

problems.title: Inadequate Digital Presence
problems.description: Lack of online engagement means Acme Corp misses out on connecting with a broader audience.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these challenges to optimize Acme Corp's digital footprint.

solutions.title: Website Design & Development
solutions.description: Revamp Acme Corp's online presence with a modern design that attracts and retains visitors.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Improve search rankings to increase visibility and drive more traffic to Acme Corp's site.

solutions.title: Content Marketing
solutions.description: Create compelling content strategies that engage customers and foster brand loyalty.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Ensure Acme Corp's site performs flawlessly on mobile, capturing and converting mobile users.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Driven Digital is your partner in transforming challenges into growth opportunities.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: We've successfully optimized digital strategies for manufacturers across North America.

whyUsCards.title: Results-Driven
whyUsCards.description: Our focus is always on measurable outcomes that matter to your bottom line.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We leverage cutting-edge technologies to keep your business ahead of the curve.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric
whyUsCards.description: Your goals are our goals. We tailor strategies to fit your specific needs.

team.name: David Moore
team.bio: David leads the strategy and client relationships at Driven Digital, ensuring every project aligns with client goals.

process.title: Discovery & Planning
process.description: We dive deep into your current digital landscape and plan a customized strategy.

process.title: Design & Development
process.description: We create and build a site that aligns with Acme Corp's brand and objectives.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's chat about how we can support your growth. No pressure, just a friendly conversation.

lead.company_description:
Driven Digital is a website agency for manufacturers and industrial service providers. 

We offer custom-built websites, website hosting & management, search engine optimization (SEO) and digital marketing.

An out-dated website costs you thousands of dollars in lost revenue and makes you look bad. With an updated website, you can increase revenue, improve your company's image and make your competitors cry.
